title: anthemis cretica subsp. saxatilis
intro: Anthemis cretica subsp. saxatilis, also known as Rock Chamomile, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is a subspecies of Anthemis cretica, commonly found in dry, rocky areas and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic properties, which have been found to have health benefits such as soothing digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and promoting relaxation. Rock Chamomile can be used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and essential oils, making it a popular choice for those seeking natural remedies for various health concerns.
